===''[[Pokémon the Series: XY]]''===
[[File:Summer Camp Team Squirtle.png|thumb|left|250px|Shauna, Trevor, and Tierno]]
Shauna debuted in ''[[XY039|Summer of Discovery!]]'', where she first met {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} while attending {{an|Professor Sycamore}}'s [[Pokémon Summer Camp]]. She had seen the [[Pokévision]] video that {{an|Serena}} filmed in [[Lumiose City]] and recognized her from it. She later used her {{TP|Shauna|Bulbasaur}} to {{pkmn|battle}} [[Serena's Fennekin]] during the Pokémon Battle Tournament held that same day.

In ''[[XY040|Day Three Blockbusters!]]'', Shauna informed Serena about [[Pokémon Showcase]]s and said her goal was to win the title of {{DL|Pokémon Performer|Kalos Queen}}, which led to Serena wanting to become a Pokémon Performer as well. She also filmed a new Pokévision video together with {{an|Tierno}} and {{an|Trevor}} as part of the activities of the Pokémon Summer Camp.

In ''[[XY041|Foggy Pokémon Orienteering!]]'', Shauna, along with Tierno and Trevor, decided to put the {{DL|Pokémon Summer Camp|PokéEnteering competition}} on hold to help Ash, Serena, and {{an|Clemont}} find {{an|Bonnie}}. The group later encountered a {{p|Xerneas|mysterious Pokémon with an X mark}} on their way back to the camp. Although they arrived too late at the camp to win any points in the race, they declared that helping their friends was worth it.

In ''[[XY042|Battling Into the Hall of Fame!]]'', Shauna, Tierno, and Trevor participated in a {{DL|Pokémon battle|Team Battle}} with Bulbasaur, {{TP|Tierno|Squirtle}}, and {{TP|Trevor|Charmander}}, respectively. Their opponents were their new friends and rivals, Ash, Serena, and Clemont using {{AP|Pikachu}}, {{TP|Serena|Fennekin}}, and {{TP|Clemont|Chespin}} as their partners. Shauna and her Bulbasaur were defeated after a hard battle against Pikachu and Chespin, leaving Tierno and Squirtle alone.
[[File:Serena and Shauna.png|thumb|250px|Shauna and Serena]]
In ''[[XY047|Dreaming a Performer's Dream!]]'', Shauna arranged a meeting with Serena and her friends in [[Lagoon Town]]. She told them that {{an|Aria}} would give an exhibition performance at a Showcase Theater there. As such, she was in the crowd at the Showcase theater together with the group, having her Bulbasaur watch it too. After watching Aria's performance, Shauna announced to Serena that she had registered for an upcoming Pokémon Showcase. She then left to {{pkmn|training|train}} and promised to stay in contact with Serena.

In ''[[XY060|A Showcase Debut!]]'', Shauna participated in the Pokémon Showcase Rookie Class that was being held in [[Coumarine City]]. In the first round, which consisted of dressing up Pokémon with accessories, she competed against [[Jessie]] and [[Alouette]] using her Bulbasaur, which she decorated with flowers. She earned the most votes from the audience and advanced to the second round, where she performed together with her Bulbasaur and {{p|Flabébé}}. After the round was over, Shauna was declared the winner of the tournament, earning her first {{DL|Pokémon Showcase|Princess Key}}.

She appeared in a Pokévision in ''[[XY064|Battling with Elegance and a Big Smile!]]'', recapping her victory in the Coumarine Showcase. In ''[[XY080|Performing with Fiery Charm!]]'', she watched Serena compete in the {{to|Dendemille}} Showcase along with Tierno and Trevor. After Serena's victory, she was seen celebrating. She also appeared in a flashback in ''[[XY086|A Legendary Photo Op!]]''.
[[File:Shauna Performer.png|thumb|left|250px|Shauna performing with her Pokémon]]
Shauna's next appearance was in ''[[XY090|Tag Team Battle Inspiration!]]'', where she met up with Ash and his friends again. Together with Serena, she faced off against Ash and Tierno in a [[Multi Battle|Tag Battle]], which was called off.

In ''[[XY091|A Performance Pop Quiz!]]'', she participated in the [[Anistar City]] Pokémon Showcase Rookie Class along with Serena, Jessie, and [[Nini]]. During the Theme Performance, she managed to answer [[Monsieur Pierre|Pierre]]'s questions correctly, granting her a spot in the second round. There, she delivered a performance along with her {{TP|Shauna|Ivysaur}} and Flabébé which was well received by the audience. However, she did not get enough votes to win the competition, and ended up in second place. She later revealed she had already obtained her second Princess Key.

In ''[[XY109|Master Class Choices!]]'', Shauna was contacted by a video call by Serena, who told her about her win at the [[Fleurrh City]] Pokémon Showcase and how she now has three Princess Keys.

In ''[[XY112|Master Class Is in Session!]]'', Shauna entered the Pokémon Showcase Master Class that was being held in [[Gloire City]]. Using her Ivysaur, she quickly made her way to the semifinals of the competition, where she found herself up against Serena and [[Jessie|Jessilee]]. In [[XY113|the following episode]], she lost the match to Serena.

From ''[[XY126|Valuable Experience for All!]]'' to ''[[XY131|Down to the Fiery Finish!]]'', Shauna was seen watching the [[Lumiose Conference]] along with her friends.

In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', Shauna joined the fight against [[Team Flare]]. She assisted Tierno, Trevor, and Sawyer in evacuating the residents of Lumiose City evacuate by creating a path. Later, she was seen in the Pokémon Center watching the announcement that was being broadcast by [[Lysandre]]. In ''[[XY133|Coming Apart at the Dreams!]]'', she assisted in evacuating the elderly and children together with Tierno, Trevor, and Sawyer, as instructed by [[Diantha]].

In ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', Shauna watched Professor Sycamore leading Ash, Serena, Bonnie, Clemont, [[Alain]], [[Mairin]], the Kalos [[Gym Leader]]s, [[Diantha]], [[Steven Stone]], and [[Malva]] in the fight against the [[Giant Rock]].

In ''[[XY138|The First Day of the Rest of Your Life!]]'', it was revealed that Serena called her to help put up a performance for the residents of Lumiose City who were still recovering from the Team Flare incident. She commented to Serena that her idea was a success while performing. The next day, she joined the others in saying goodbye to {{kal|Grace}}, Serena's mother. Later, she pulled Tierno's ear, as he was infatuated with Serena. She, along with Tierno and Trevor, then headed off to Sycamore's lab to assist him in the observation of the [[wild Pokemon]] that left Lumiose City during the incident.

In ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]'', Shauna and the rest of her group watched some of the aforementioned Pokémon.
